# Calibration and Metrology Traceability: Ensuring Measurement Confidence in Containment Systems

## 适用受众
CTO

## 写作角度说明
测量仪器的校准和量值溯源是确保气密门、传递窗等设备性能数据可信的基础。CTO 需要理解为什么供应商的校准体系直接关系到设备长期运行的可信度，以及如何在采购阶段评估供应商的计量管理水平。

## 核心论点 / 洞察
Calibration traceability—not just calibration frequency—determines whether the pressure readings and seal performance data your facility relies on for regulatory compliance can withstand regulatory scrutiny.

## 参考素材
- Metrology traceability chain: reference standard → working standard → field instrument, unbroken chain documentation
- Differential pressure transmitter calibration: zero/span adjustment, accuracy verification (±1Pa), environmental temperature compensation
- Calibration interval determination: usage intensity, environmental conditions, manufacturer recommendations
- ISO 17025 accredited calibration laboratories: CNAS-recognized calibration providers for pressure instruments
- In-situ vs laboratory calibration: trade-offs between instrument removal downtime and calibration accuracy
- Calibration certificate requirements: traceability to national standards, measurement uncertainty statement, as-found/as-left data
- NIST traceability: reference standard hierarchy for pressure measurement (primary standard → secondary standard → working gauge)
- Calibration record management: retention requirements (typically 10+ years for GMP facilities), electronic vs paper records
- JIEHAO's calibration practice as reference: certificate documentation format, calibration interval recommendations per component
- Regulatory implications: FDA 21 CFR Part 211.68 (automatic, mechanical, and electronic equipment), EU GMP Annex 11

## 关键词
Calibration, Metrology Traceability, ISO 17025, CNAS, Pressure Calibration, Measurement Uncertainty, NIST Traceability, 3Q Validation, Regulatory Compliance, Calibration Certificate
